ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_market_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* Adjusted price per unit of energy */,
  "installed_units" INTEGER /* Number of installed units */,
  "new_installations" INTEGER /* Number of new installations in the current year */,
  "installed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total installed capacity */,
  "new_installed_capacity" INTEGER /* New installed capacity in the current year */,
  "demand" REAL /* Total demand for energy */,
  "supply" REAL /* Total supply of energy */,
  "demand_supply_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of demand to supply */,
  "net_demand" REAL /* Net demand (demand - supply) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the data */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., Solar, Wind, Hydro) */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Distinguishes between historical data and future projections */,
  "renewable_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy from renewable sources */,
  "non_renewable_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy from non-renewable sources */,
  "carbon_emissions" REAL /* Total carbon emissions associated with the energy production */,
  "renewable_capacity" INTEGER /* Installed capacity of renewable energy systems */,
  "non_renewable_capacity" INTEGER /* Installed capacity of non-renewable energy systems */,
  "government_funding" REAL /* Government funding or subsidies for energy systems */,
  "regulatory_changes" TEXT /* Summary of recent regulatory changes affecting the energy market */,
  "market_trends" TEXT /* Summary of current market trends and insights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "region", "energy_source")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy system */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the energy system (e.g., Solar, Wind, Hydro) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy system */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Initial installation cost */,
  "operational_cost" REAL /* Operational cost per unit of energy */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy system */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the energy system in years */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Annual maintenance cost of the energy system */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Summary of the environmental impact of the energy system */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the energy system is renewable */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used in the energy system */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the system's data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the energy system (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the market report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Key terms or topics covered in the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the report to the energy market */,
  "associated_systems" TEXT /* Energy systems discussed in the report */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the report's impact on the energy market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions or access levels granted to the user */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization or expertise of the user */,
  "reports_accessed" INTEGER /* Number of reports accessed by the user */,
  "last_report_accessed" TEXT /* Date of the last report accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy system accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market report accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geolocation of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES energy_market_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES market_reports ("report_id")
)
